scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[4.5rem] leading-[1.05] tracking-tighter font-medium text-white
scales.h2: text-2xl lg:text-3xl leading-snug tracking-tight text-white/90 font-heading
scales.overline: text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#7B61FF] font-data

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Asymmetrical Grid. Mode A (Tetris) adapted for a technical dashboard look.
layout_and_spacing.hero_wrapper: relative min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center pt-32 pb-24 border-b border-white/5
layout_and_spacing.grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 lg:gap-8 items-center

buttons.wrapper: flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start gap-4 pt-4
buttons.primary: h-14 px-8 bg-[#7B61FF] text-white font-data text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide flex items-center justify-center transition-all hover:bg-[#6A50E5] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7B61FF]/50 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(123,97,255,0.15)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(123,97,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: h-14 px-8 border border-white/20 bg-transparent text-white font-data text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide flex items-center justify-center transition-all hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/40 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/20

trust_bar.wrapper: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8 pt-16 mt-16 border-t border-white/10 w-full
trust_bar.title: font-data text-xs text-white uppercase tracking-widest
trust_bar.subtitle: font-data text-xs text-white/40

live_metrics_terminal.wrapper: w-full border border-white/10 bg-[#0B0B0F]/90 backdrop-blur-xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
live_metrics_terminal.header: flex justify-between items-center border-b border-white/10 pb-4 mb-6
live_metrics_terminal.live_indicator: flex items-center gap-2 text-[#00FF94] text-xs font-data uppercase tracking-widest
live_metrics_terminal.data_row: flex justify-between items-center py-3 border-b border-white/5 last:border-0

motion.reveal: Use Framer Motion to stagger the Y-axis fade-in of the left column elements (H1, Body, Buttons) with a spring transition.
motion.live_pulse: The #00FF94 values and a tiny green circle indicator in the terminal should have a subtle random opacity pulse to simulate live data ticks.
motion.glow_blob: Absolute div at top right, w-[800px] h-[800px] bg-[#7B61FF]/10 rounded-full blur-[120px] -z-10 pointer-events-none mix-blend-screen

assets.icons: lucide-react (Link, Activity, ShieldCheck, Database, Terminal, ArrowRight)

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Outfit' and 'JetBrains Mono' fonts are imported via Google Fonts in index.html.
Add Tailwind config overrides to map 'font-heading' to Outfit and 'font-data' to JetBrains Mono.

Do NOT use a static image for the right side visual. Build the 'live_metrics_terminal' component using pure HTML/Tailwind/Framer Motion. It should look like a high-end quantitative trading terminal node.
Populate the terminal with institutional-grade mock data, not hype text. E.g., 'Alpha Engine V4', 'Sharpe Ratio: 2.1', 'Execution Latency: 12ms', 'Network: Ethereum Mainnet'.
Use standard sharp borders (rounded-none) for buttons and the terminal to enforce the serious, technical aesthetic.
Implement the 4 trust points (Verified On-Chain, Transparent Metrics, Built for Serious Traders, Zero Hype Real Data) using the specified Lucide icons. Place them at the bottom of the section.
Left align all typography in the left column. Never center align it.
Ensure total opacity contrast rules are met. Do not use generic Shadcn cards with rounded corners; stick to the hard rectangular terminal aesthetic defined here.
